And I think that, like, one of the tensions that we're feeling right now is that one of the reasons we want to move in-house is so that we can use the dollars that we have available to us in really smart ways and get as much work product out of it as possible while, like, owning that work.
And I think that, like, where we are right now with this scope and what you are able, like, my read of this, transparently, is that, like, we're a small fish.

think like that's part of it is like, you know, the way I kind of think about it is, okay, so we have X months and scope left in the contract, right?

Definitely interested and definitely through end of year.
Yeah, the thinking was, too, like, because we know we had time.
We wanted to give, like, a lengthy exit.
Hmm.
I
That play on for everybody.
So yeah, let's move forward with business as usual, for sure.
Okay.
Okay.
Sounds good.

So I'll just wait for either of you to just like, let us know, like, I think the, the ideal scenario here would be like, you know, if like, we want to try to reuse the capacity of the rest of the, essentially like the scope we have in the contract, because it's quite a, like almost like 10 months still left.
Um, we can redeploy that and come up with something, you know?
Um, and like that, like the way I'm thinking this would be super transparent.

It's like, I think it would be super reasonable, even though we've never done this for any client to like, just say like 50% of the rest of the contract as a way to kind of, you know, like for us to wrap things up.
And then what that means is essentially like shortening the end of the contract.
And then the question just becomes like, based on that, right?
Do you want to keep going for that rest of the time?
Make it a

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Homebase's plan to take SEO and GEO content programs in-house.](https://fathom.video/share/WkyFJiAQs_9axRuwCuQtaHquzgRjSeHA?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Homebase's Plan:** Homebase will take its SEO/GEO content in-house, citing high management overhead and a new internal AI infrastructure built on Aerofs.](https://fathom.video/share/WkyFJiAQs_9axRuwCuQtaHquzgRjSeHA?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [**Core Issue:** The current GrowthX process requires more internal management and revision cycles than Homebase's own systems, which they attribute to a lack of "AI engineering" in feedback loops.](https://fathom.video/share/WkyFJiAQs_9axRuwCuQtaHquzgRjSeHA?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Proposals:** GrowthX offered two paths: 1) a "bake-off" strategy sprint to prove its new onboarding process, or 2) a pilot of its upcoming platform for direct client workflow ownership.](https://fathom.video/share/WkyFJiAQs_9axRuwCuQtaHquzgRjSeHA?tab=summary&timestamp=823.0)
  - [**Contract Exit Options:** Marcel proposed two ways to exit the contract early: 1) pay a 50% cancellation fee on the remaining \~10 months, or 2) redeploy the contract's value for a different scope.](https://fathom.video/share/WkyFJiAQs_9axRuwCuQtaHquzgRjSeHA?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)

## Topics

### Homebase's Decision to Go In-House

  - [Homebase plans to bring its SEO and GEO content programs in-house.](https://fathom.video/share/WkyFJiAQs_9axRuwCuQtaHquzgRjSeHA?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [**Rationale:**](https://fathom.video/share/WkyFJiAQs_9axRuwCuQtaHquzgRjSeHA?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
      - [**High Overhead:** The current GrowthX process requires more internal management and revision cycles than Homebase's own systems.](https://fathom.video/share/WkyFJiAQs_9axRuwCuQtaHquzgRjSeHA?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
      - [**Internal AI Push:** A strategic directive from leadership (John, Ray) to build and own internal AI infrastructure.](https://fathom.video/share/WkyFJiAQs_9axRuwCuQtaHquzgRjSeHA?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
      - [**Cost Efficiency:** A belief that internal ownership will yield more work product from available funds than the current scope allows.](https://fathom.video/share/WkyFJiAQs_9axRuwCuQtaHquzgRjSeHA?tab=summary&timestamp=1451.0)

### Feedback on GrowthX Engagement

  - [**Process Inefficiency:** The team prefers building and running their own Aerofs flows over the high-revision GrowthX process.](https://fathom.video/share/WkyFJiAQs_9axRuwCuQtaHquzgRjSeHA?tab=summary&timestamp=477.0)
  - [**Post-Migration Quality Drop:** The migration to the new Becerra system required re-coaching to restore prior content quality.](https://fathom.video/share/WkyFJiAQs_9axRuwCuQtaHquzgRjSeHA?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [**Feedback Loop Issue:** Feedback feels applied directly to a flow, not translated by an "AI engineer."](https://fathom.video/share/WkyFJiAQs_9axRuwCuQtaHquzgRjSeHA?tab=summary&timestamp=477.0)
      - [**Result:** Subsequent drafts often don't address feedback, creating friction and slowing progress.](https://fathom.video/share/WkyFJiAQs_9axRuwCuQtaHquzgRjSeHA?tab=summary&timestamp=477.0)
  - [**Reporting Gap:** Performance reporting has never been delivered.](https://fathom.video/share/WkyFJiAQs_9axRuwCuQtaHquzgRjSeHA?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)

### GrowthX's Proposed Solutions

  - [Marcel presented two options to address Homebase's concerns and retain the relationship.](https://fathom.video/share/WkyFJiAQs_9axRuwCuQtaHquzgRjSeHA?tab=summary&timestamp=823.0)
  - [**Option 1: "Bake-Off" Strategy Sprint**](https://fathom.video/share/WkyFJiAQs_9axRuwCuQtaHquzgRjSeHA?tab=summary&timestamp=823.0)
      - [**Proposal:** Onboard Homebase as a "new client" with a dedicated team and the new, successful onboarding process used with clients like Lovable.](https://fathom.video/share/WkyFJiAQs_9axRuwCuQtaHquzgRjSeHA?tab=summary&timestamp=823.0)
      - [**Terms:** A short sprint with clear goals; if quality isn't significantly better, the contract ends early.](https://fathom.video/share/WkyFJiAQs_9axRuwCuQtaHquzgRjSeHA?tab=summary&timestamp=823.0)
  - [**Option 2: Direct Platform Access Pilot**](https://fathom.video/share/WkyFJiAQs_9axRuwCuQtaHquzgRjSeHA?tab=summary&timestamp=981.0)
      - [**Proposal:** Pause billing and provide early access to GrowthX's upcoming platform for Homebase to build and own workflows directly.](https://fathom.video/share/WkyFJiAQs_9axRuwCuQtaHquzgRjSeHA?tab=summary&timestamp=981.0)
      - [**Platform Details:**](https://fathom.video/share/WkyFJiAQs_9axRuwCuQtaHquzgRjSeHA?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
          - [**Open Source Framework:** Workflows are built in code using the `output.ai` framework, enabling full ownership and exportability.](https://fathom.video/share/WkyFJiAQs_9axRuwCuQtaHquzgRjSeHA?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)
          - [**API Access:** Workflows can be exposed via API, allowing integration into tools like n8n for custom orchestration.](https://fathom.video/share/WkyFJiAQs_9axRuwCuQtaHquzgRjSeHA?tab=summary&timestamp=1198.0)
          - [**Advanced Capabilities:** Includes agentic research (with confidence scoring), programmatic infographics, and site-wide monitoring.](https://fathom.video/share/WkyFJiAQs_9axRuwCuQtaHquzgRjSeHA?tab=summary&timestamp=1243.0)
  - [**Contract Exit Options**](https://fathom.video/share/WkyFJiAQs_9axRuwCuQtaHquzgRjSeHA?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)
      - [**Option A (Cancellation):** Pay a 50% cancellation fee on the remaining \~10 months of the contract to terminate early.](https://fathom.video/share/WkyFJiAQs_9axRuwCuQtaHquzgRjSeHA?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)
      - [**Option B (Redeployment):** Redirect the remaining contract value to a different scope, such as building advanced workflows for Homebase to own.](https://fathom.video/share/WkyFJiAQs_9axRuwCuQtaHquzgRjSeHA?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Katie & Kerry:** Discuss the options internally and provide a decision to Marcel.](https://fathom.video/share/WkyFJiAQs_9axRuwCuQtaHquzgRjSeHA?tab=summary&timestamp=1626.0)
  - [**GrowthX:** Continue with business as usual until a decision is made.](https://fathom.video/share/WkyFJiAQs_9axRuwCuQtaHquzgRjSeHA?tab=summary&timestamp=1652.0)

action_items.description: Discuss GrowthX options w/ Kerry; send decision to Marcel re: exit vs redeployment
Continue GrowthX work through Dec for Homebase
